title: thymus serpyllum subsp. quinquecostatus
intro: Thymus serpyllum subsp. quinquecostatus, commonly known as the five-ribbed thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant, characterized by its distinctive five-ribbed leaves. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have medicinal effects in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum subsp. quinquecostatus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are commonly used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
